codeReview.summary: voice-pipeline milestone ships four features: ambient-core, extraction-notes, dictation, and voice-actions-autostart. All new code follows existing patterns. No blocking issues found.

featuresReviewed.notes: AmbientService gains get_transcript() with TRANSCRIPT_MAXLEN cap. ambient_available() provides availability check. GET /ambient/transcript endpoint added. GET /ambient/status extended with available+reason fields.
Extraction pipeline already existed (extract_summary -> save_note). GET /ambient/notes?q= now filters by date. GET /ambient/notes/{date} already existed.
GET /dictation/status endpoint added. DictationService.available gracefully handles missing binary. client.dictation_status() added.

Ambient autostart on server boot reads voice config. Voice config at ~/.config/inbox/voice.json with defaults. GET/PUT /voice/config endpoints. route_voice_command() hook with register_voice_command_handler().

summary: All four voice-pipeline sub-features implemented and tested. 40 new tests added (563 total, all passing). Pyright clean, ruff clean.
